0.name: Colin
0.text: Uhm... excuse me, ma'am. But would you have an idea where the Physics textbooks might be at?

1.name: Librarian
1.text: Oh... I'm really sorry, but we haven't finished reshelving and cataloging the books yet.

2.name: Librarian
2.text: But if you want, you can go search through the piles. Do feel free!
